items.title: Solana eyes 64.8K daily SOL burn – Is Hyperliquid’s rise behind it?
items.whyYouShouldCare: The anticipated daily SOL burn of 64.8K could enhance scarcity and support SOL's value, driven by increased activity on Hyperliquid.

items.title: Strategy's Michael Saylor teases BTC buy with 'working better' tweet
items.whyYouShouldCare: Michael Saylor's hints at a potential BTC purchase could influence market sentiment, indirectly affecting SOL's positioning as investors reassess their crypto strategies.

items.title: UK treats crypto network like a sanctioned bank after claims it processed $90B for Russia
items.whyYouShouldCare: The UK's classification of a crypto network as a sanctioned bank highlights regulatory risks that could impact liquidity and operational dynamics within the Solana ecosystem.
